title: Nami Warns Against the Island
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is nami warns against the island.
scene: The scene focuses on nami warns against the island, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm going to be the pirate King!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!! Who are you?! What's your name?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aaaaaaaahh!!!! He got sliced up too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He said he was at "Punk Hazard"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You think that's the Flaming Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Surely it's too late for that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We ought to have a one-in-three chance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So hot!! It burns!! Help me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But to think he would follow ...

summary: Nami Warns Against the Island. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
